info.name: Grad Project API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Grad Project Backend
Base URL: http://localhost:3000/api/v1

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer Token.
1. Register or Login first
2. Copy the `access_token` from the response
3. Set it in the collection variable `token`

## Variables
- `baseUrl`: http://localhost:3000/api/v1
- `token`: JWT access token (set after login)
- `projectId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a project
- `activityId`: MongoDB ObjectId of an activity
- `participantId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a participant
- `beneficiaryId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a beneficiary
- `indicatorId`: MongoDB ObjectId of an indicator
- `surveyId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a survey
- `questionId`: MongoDB ObjectId of a survey question

request.description:
type: educational | health | training | intervention | evaluation
status: planned | in_progress | completed

body.raw:
{
  "project": "{{projectId}}",
  "title": "Leadership Skills Workshop",
  "description": "Interactive workshop focused on developing essential leadership skills for young professionals",
  "activityDate": "2024-03-15",
  "startTime": "09:00",
  "endTime": "12:00",
  "location": "Riyadh Community Center, Hall A",
  "capacity": 50,
  "activityType": "workshop",
  "status": "planned",
  "tags": ["leadership", "training", "youth"]
}

request.description:
activityType: training | workshop | seminar | consultation | field_visit
status: planned | in_progress | completed | cancelled

gender: male | female | other
status: active | completed | dropped | pending

body.raw:
{
  "beneficiaryType": "individual",
  "name": "John Doe",
  "age": 28,
  "educationLevel": "Bachelor's Degree",
  "profession": "Software Engineer",
  "gender": "male",
  "phone": "+966501234567",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "nationalId": "1234567890",
  "city": "Riyadh",
  "region": "Central Region",
  "notes": "Additional notes about the beneficiary"
}

request.description:
beneficiaryType: individual | area

For AREA type, use:
{
  "beneficiaryType": "area",
  "name": "Al-Malaz District",
  "areaSize": 250,
  "population": 15000,
  "city": "Riyadh",
  "region": "Central Region"
}

interactionLevel: 1-5 (1=minimal, 5=intensive)
participationDegree: 1-5 (1=passive, 5=fully active)
satisfactionRating: 1-5 (1=very dissatisfied, 5=very satisfied)

body.raw:
{
  "project": "{{projectId}}",
  "indicatorType": "output",
  "name": "Number of beneficiaries reached",
  "description": "Total number of individuals who received direct assistance",
  "measurementMethod": "Survey and direct counting",
  "targetValue": 1000,
  "actualValue": 0,
  "unit": "number",
  "dataSource": "Project database and field surveys",
  "baselineValue": 0,
  "frequency": "monthly",
  "responsiblePerson": "John Doe",
  "tags": ["education", "literacy"],
  "thresholds": {
    "critical": 300,
    "warning": 500,
    "good": 800,
    "excellent": 1000
  },
  "isActive": true
}

request.description:
indicatorType: input | output | outcome | impact | process
unit: number | percentage | currency | hours | days | custom
type: input | output | outcome | impact | process

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Pre-Activity Assessment Survey",
  "description": "This survey assesses participants knowledge before the activity",
  "type": "evaluation",
  "activity": "{{activityId}}",
  "isAnonymous": false,
  "welcomeMessage": "Welcome! Please answer all questions honestly.",
  "thankYouMessage": "Thank you for your participation!",
  "targetResponses": 100,
  "tags": ["assessment", "baseline"],
  "settings": {
    "showProgressBar": true,
    "randomizeQuestions": false,
    "requiredCompletion": true,
    "language": "ar"
  }
}

{
  "survey": "{{surveyId}}",
  "questionText": "How satisfied are you with the program?",
  "type": "rating",
  "isRequired": true,
  "description": "Please rate from 1 to 5",
  "options": [],
  "tags": ["satisfaction"],
  "isQuiz": false
}

request.description:
type: text | textarea | number | email | phone | date | single_choice | multiple_choice | dropdown | rating | scale | matrix | file_upload | yes_no

For single_choice/multiple_choice/dropdown, add options:
"options": ["Option 1", "Option 2", "Option 3"]

For quiz questions:
"isQuiz": true,
"correctAnswer": "Option 2",
"points": 10

body.raw:
{
  "survey": "{{surveyId}}",
  "questionText": "Which of the following best describes your educational background?",
  "type": "single_choice",
  "isRequired": true,
  "options": ["High School", "Bachelor's Degree", "Master's Degree", "PhD", "Other"],
  "tags": ["demographics"]
}

{
  "survey": "{{surveyId}}",
  "questionText": "What is the capital of Saudi Arabia?",
  "type": "single_choice",
  "isRequired": true,
  "options": ["Jeddah", "Riyadh", "Mecca", "Medina"],
  "isQuiz": true,
  "correctAnswer": "Riyadh",
  "points": 10
}

request.description:
Choose ONE of these value types:
- textValue: "Paris"
- numberValue: 42
- booleanValue: true
- dateValue: "2024-01-15"

Each answer can have ONE value type:
- textValue: string
- numberValue: number
- booleanValue: boolean
- dateValue: date string
Returns statistics based on the authenticated user's role
